query:
SELECT 
  c.code,
  c.nameEn,
  c.gaId,
  COUNT(m.id) as total_mappings,
  SUM(CASE WHEN m.weight > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as non_zero_mappings,
  SUM(m.weight) as total_weight,
  SUM(CASE WHEN m.weight > 0 THEN m.weight ELSE 0 END) as non_zero_weight,
  AVG(CASE WHEN m.weight > 0 THEN m.weight ELSE NULL END) as avg_weight
FROM competencies c
LEFT JOIN mappings m ON c.id = m.competencyId
LEFT JOIN plos p ON m.ploId = p.id
WHERE p.programId = 20
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.nameEn, c.gaId
ORDER BY c.code;

  AVG(CASE WHEN m.weight > 0 THEN m.weight ELSE NULL END) as avg_weight
FROM competencies c
LEFT JOIN mappings m ON c.id = m.competencyId
LEFT JOIN plos p ON m.ploId = p.id
WHERE p.programId = 20
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.nameEn, c.gaId
ORDER BY c.code;
